doctors.name: Dr. Sarah Mitchell
doctors.bio: Experienced cardiologist with 10 years of expertise in heart disease treatment and management. Board-certified with specialized training in interventional cardiology.

doctors.name: Dr. Omar Hassan
doctors.bio: Specialist neurologist with 8 years of experience in diagnosing and treating neurological disorders. Expert in advanced diagnostic techniques.

doctors.name: Dr. Fatima Ahmed
doctors.bio: Dedicated pediatrician with 12 years of experience in child healthcare and emergency pediatric care. Specialist in developmental disorders.

doctors.name: Dr. Mohamed Ali
doctors.bio: General surgeon with 15 years of surgical expertise. Specialized in minimally invasive surgical techniques and complex surgical procedures.

doctors.name: Dr. Layla Ibrahim
doctors.bio: Experienced dermatologist with 9 years in skin disease treatment and laser therapy. Expert in cosmetic and clinical dermatology.
